We've splintered reality. Now we have to fix it.

  1. 1

    Connect
    Wallet

  2. 2

    Choose
    Location

  3. 3

    Perform
    Lockdrop

  1. Connect Wallet

    Connect your wallet to sign in.

  2. Choose your Snuggery location

    Pick 1 from 5 planes of reality.

  3. Perform the Lockdrop

    Lock ETH or USDB to hatch some of your very own Munchables.
